name: polytope
description: This project is an advanced, high-performance visualizer for 4D polytopes (24-cell, 120-cell, and 600-cell) using Python, OpenGL, and GLFW. It is uniquely designed to mathematically extract and visualize the discrete [Hopf Fibration](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hopf_fibration), rendering the spectacular intertwined geometries of 4D space down to 3D.
